text: There is a distant hum of artificial light and the mild displacement of being at an odd angle. Everything feels cool and abstract, as though knowledge is being fostered in these quiet, vacant rooms. I am enveloped by curiosity, tinged with a sense of solitude. The neon glow and stark geometry awaken thoughts about modernity, progress, and the isolated yet connective spaces of contemporary life. My mind is both alert and contemplative—I feel on the threshold of discovery, as if every shadow hides an idea.
